summary: Iteration 123 - UX Consistency Fixes Testing: All tests passed. Verified 4 UX inconsistencies are fixed: (1) No duplicate check-in banner in AppointmentHeader (only 1 CheckinBlock visible), (2) No green trust signal banner for participants (trust info only in AppointmentEssentials), (3) Calendar sync status loaded for ALL roles (participants see their own Google/Outlook buttons), (4) Calendar sync buttons available for participants (isOrganizer guard removed).

frontend_playwright: ✅ Organizer view: No duplicate check-in banners in header (checkin-before-window=0, checkin-after-window=0)
✅ Organizer view: Trust signal only in AppointmentEssentials (trust-signal=1, trust-signal-banner=0)
✅ Organizer view: Google calendar button present
✅ Organizer view: AppointmentEssentials visible with trust text 'Engagement actif · 1 participant garanti'
✅ Participant view: NO green trust signal banner (trust-signal-banner=0)
✅ Participant view: Trust info in AppointmentEssentials visible ('Engagement actif · 2 participants garantis')
✅ Participant view: Google calendar button visible (participant's own connection)
✅ Participant view: CheckinBlock present ('Check-in disponible dans 8h 31min')
✅ Participant view: 'Annuler ma participation' button present
✅ Participant view: 'Annuler l'engagement' button NOT shown (organizer only)
✅ Dashboard loads without errors for organizer (igaal@hotmail.com)
✅ Dashboard loads without errors for participant (testuser_audit@nlyt.app)
✅ No console errors on dashboard for either role

critical_code_review_comments: AppointmentHeader.js: Correctly removed duplicate time-gate blocks (lines 106-121 deleted per review_request). Only CheckinBlock now handles time-gating.
AppointmentDetail.js: calendarAPI.getSyncStatus() correctly moved outside viewerIsOrganizer guard (line 409). Both roles now load their own calendar sync status.

SecondaryActions.js: isOrganizer guard correctly removed from Google/Outlook calendar buttons. Buttons now render based on syncStatus.google.has_connection / syncStatus.outlook.has_connection for all roles.
AppointmentEssentials.js: Trust signal correctly displayed with data-testid='trust-signal' for all roles. No separate green banner.

CheckinBlock.js: Unified check-in block correctly handles time-gating for both organizer and participant with data-testid='checkin-block-before-window', 'checkin-block-after-window', 'checkin-block-pending', 'checkin-block-confirmed'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UX consistency fixes verified. Key changes: (1) AppointmentHeader no longer has time-gate blocks - only CheckinBlock handles this, (2) No green trust banner for participants - trust info only in AppointmentEssentials, (3) Calendar sync status loaded for all roles via calendarAPI.getSyncStatus(), (4) Calendar buttons (Google/Outlook) available for all roles based on viewer's own connections. Test appointments: 884a22e1-e110-49ec-b785-2bab318b7084 (igaal@hotmail.com organizer), e823473a-f37a-4f59-8576-82e49ee22c53 (igaal@hotmail.com organizer, testuser_audit@nlyt.app participant).

features_verified.2_no_green_trust_banner_participant: ✅ VERIFIED - trust-signal-banner=0 for participant, trust info only in AppointmentEssentials
features_verified.3_calendar_sync_all_roles: ✅ VERIFIED - GET /api/calendar/sync/status/{id} works for participant, returns viewer's own connections
features_verified.4_calendar_buttons_all_roles: ✅ VERIFIED - Google button visible for participant (has_connection=true)
features_verified.5_organizer_cancel_button: ✅ VERIFIED - 'Annuler l'engagement' button present for organizer
features_verified.6_participant_cancel_button: ✅ VERIFIED - 'Annuler ma participation' button present for participant
features_verified.7_dashboard_regression: ✅ VERIFIED - Dashboard loads without errors for both roles
